headline: ILMN Stock Gains Following Expanded Collaboration With Labcorp
summary: Illumina gains after expanding Labcorp collaboration to boost NGS oncology adoption, broaden testing access, and drive growth in precision cancer care.

headline: Why Is Labcorp (LH) Down 4.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Labcorp (LH) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
